summary: Completed testing for Batch 2 features: Email Templates, Reviews Management (Supabase), and Product Photo Migration. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 3 admin pages load correctly with full functionality. Fixed routing bug in email-templates /assets endpoint.

issues: Escape key does not close the modal - overlay intercepts clicks. Minor UX issue, modal still closes with X button

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /api/email-templates/assets route was defined after /{template_id} causing 'assets' to be parsed as UUID - moved route before parameterized route
Email templates CRUD working with auto-variable extraction from {{variableName}} syntax
Reviews visibility toggle uses PUT method correctly (not PATCH)
Product images all migrated to Supabase Storage (122/122, 0 local paths remaining)
Reviews /admin alias endpoint working for frontend compatibility
seed_data_creation: Created test email templates and reviews during testing, cleaned up via pytest fixture
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 2 testing complete. Email Templates CRUD (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, preview, duplicate, variables, assets), Reviews Supabase APIs (/admin, /stats, import-csv, visibility toggle, bulk-delete), and Product Photo Migration (122 images on Supabase Storage) all verified. Frontend pages /admin/email-templates, /admin/product-reviews-importer, /admin/reviews-tool all working.

endpoints_tested: POST /api/email-templates - Creates template with auto-extracted variables
POST /api/email-templates/{id}/preview - Renders HTML with test data
GET /api/email-templates/variables - Returns available variables and cart link templates
GET /api/email-templates/assets - Lists email assets (9 files found)
GET /api/reviews/admin - Returns all reviews including hidden (46 reviews)
POST /api/reviews/bulk-delete - Deletes multiple reviews at once

product_photo_migration.details: GET /api/products/migrate-photos/status shows: total_images=122, supabase=122, local=0, migration_complete=true

features: Product dropdown populated from Supabase API (10 products)

bug_fixed.issue: GET /api/email-templates/assets returning 500 error with UUID parse error
bug_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering - /assets route was defined after /{template_id}, so 'assets' was parsed as template UUID
bug_fixed.fix: Moved /assets route before /{template_id} route in email_templates.py

tests_executed: Frontend: Email Templates page load - PASS
Frontend: Reviews Importer page load - PASS
Frontend: Reviews Tool page load - PASS
Frontend: Reviews Tool bulk selection - PASS
